overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking from a dark corridor through a neon-lit lounge and shop, eventually emerging into an outdoor plaza mixing traditional Japanese architecture with futuristic city elements. The sequence features distinct lighting transitions from dark interiors to vibrant neon spaces and finally to natural dusk lighting.

events.description: exits dark corridor and enters brightly lit lounge area with green neon lighting
passes through doorway into lounge space

agents.ego_description: walking through dark hallway and entering a lounge area with green neon lighting

entered.detail: greenish dark walls of narrow hallway
door with glass window leading to lit interior

segments.scene_description: The video begins in a narrow dark corridor with greenish walls. The camera approaches and passes through a door with a glass window, entering a lounge area with green neon ceiling lights. The lighting changes dramatically from near-darkness to artificial illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit lounge with seating area and vending machines

events.description: turns right toward door with red light above it

agents.ego_description: walking through lounge past seated individuals toward a door on the right side

person sitting on couch facing the camera

entered.detail: low wooden couch with two people seated
tall rectangular illuminated lamp with geometric pattern
row of dark vending machines against back wall
dark door with horizontal red light above frame

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a lounge furnished with a low couch where two individuals are seated, floor lamps, and a large wall painting. The space features carpeted flooring and vending machines against the back wall. The camera turns right and approaches a dark door marked with a horizontal red light above the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: retail shop with neon signage and display counters

events.description: enters shop through door with red light frame
approaches counter and turns to face window

agents.ego_description: walking through shop examining merchandise displays and approaching the front counter

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing at counter looking out window

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign with geometric design
cyan neon sign with vertical text
bright orange plastic chair against wall
glass display case with illuminated base
large window with metal security mesh overlooking street

segments.scene_description: Passing through the door, the scene transitions into a retail shop with vibrant pink and blue neon signs illuminating the walls. The camera walks past merchandise shelves and an orange chair, approaching a counter where a person in a red dress stands looking out a metal-mesh window. The space has polished floors and display cases with illuminated bases.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with traditional Japanese architecture and bamboo

events.description: exits shop into outdoor plaza with cobblestone ground
lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural dusk illumination

agents.ego_description: emerging into outdoor plaza and observing the surroundings including pedestrians and architecture

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket standing with arms crossed

entered.detail: traditional Japanese pavilion with dark wooden beams and pillars
dense bamboo plants lining the plaza edge
tall modern buildings with illuminated billboards in background
tall vertical neon advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the shop into an open-air plaza with cobblestone ground and traditional Japanese wooden architecture. Bamboo groves line the left side while futuristic skyscrapers with neon billboards rise in the background. Several pedestrians stand around the plaza as the lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural dusk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, claustrophobic interior into a vibrant neon-lit commercial space before emerging into a sprawling outdoor plaza at dusk. It begins in a narrow, dark corridor with greenish walls, passing through a glass door as the lighting shifts dramatically into a lounge illuminated by green neon ceiling lights. The camera then glides past a low couch and vending machines before turning right and passing through a dark doorway marked by a red light. This transition opens into a retail shop where the atmosphere transforms into a glow of pink and blue neon signs, moving past merchandise shelves toward a counter and a metal-mesh window. Finally, the camera exits the shop onto a cobblestone plaza, where the artificial neon gives way to natural dusk light amidst a blend of traditional Japanese wooden architecture, bamboo groves, and towering futuristic skyscrapers.
